title: Z21 handset
subtitle: Pair a Z21 handset with BigFred and choose which locomotives you may drive.

alerts.noServer: No command station on this layout has the Z21 handset server enabled. Ask an admin to turn it on under

fields.allowAllVehicles: All vehicles I have permission to drive on this layout
fields.handsetBrakeSecsHint: {{min}}–{{max}} seconds without handset communication with BigFred

status.keepaliveHint: After {{seconds}} seconds without communication with BigFred, trains controlled by the handset are emergency-stopped

clients.empty: No active Z21 handset UDP connections.

pending.title: Pairing code
pending.instructions:
Enter CV3 and CV4 in the Z21 app on any locomotive:
• POM — programming on the main track
• Programming track — service-mode CV access
• Functions F0–F32 — digit by digit (F0–F9: one digit, F10–F32: two digits; e.g. code 122-145: F1 F2 F2 F1 F4 F5)
